title: HU19 2RE, Cattle (Holderness) Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/AP3531FB/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Cattle (Holderness) Limited   Installation name: Southfield Pig Farm   Permit number: EPR/AP3531FB/V004   "
